title: On Spion Kop
content:
Foremost of all on battle's fiery steep
        Here VERTUE fell, and here he sleeps his sleep.*
    A fairer name no Roman ever gave
        To stand sole monument on Valour's grave.
meaning:
"On Spion Kop" is a quintessential example of Henry John Newbolt, Sir's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
